artifact_summary: Cover page for Appendix B of the HFC AWTP Master Plan, featuring the Hazen and Reliable Tampa Partners logos and titled 'Building Number Map'.
artifact_blurb: Official title page for Appendix B of the HFC Advanced Water Treatment Plant (AWTP) Master Plan. The document serves as a cover sheet for the accompanying 'Building Number Map' and prominently displays the corporate branding of Hazen and the Reliable Tampa Partners.
